title: Scimitar
content:

*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] *[[Galactic Empire]][[Lando 3|''Lando'' 3]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=*[[Maul|Darth Maul]] *[[Darth Sidious]] |captains=*[[Grievous]] *[[Chanath Cha]] |crewmembers=[[O-66]] |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|This vessel was originally designed as a hunter-killer, with many unique capabilities. It is a very ''special'' ship. It has had very special owners.|O-66, regarding the ''Scimitar''|}} The '''''Scimitar''''', also known as the '''Sith Infiltrator''', was a heavily modified [[Star Courier]] and the personal [[starship]] of [[Maul|Darth Maul]]. After his defeat during the [[Battle of Naboo]], the experimental [[starfighter]] was appropriated by Maul's [[Sith Master|master]], [[Darth Sidious]]. ==Characteristics== {{Quote|A ship! It came out of nowhere! It was cloaked!|The ''Scimitar'' arrives at a battle|}} [[File:Sith_Infiltrator_TFOWM.png|thumb|left|250px|Multi-angle view of ''Scimitar'' with wings folded]] The [[Sith]] Infiltrator featured folding wings around its spherical [[cockpit]], and was secretly modified from a [[Star Courier]] manufactured by [[Republic Sienar Systems]]. It was suspected that the ''Scimitar'' was designed by the [[Sith Lord]] [[Darth Tenebrous]]. The craft featured six [[laser cannon]]s, a [[proton torpedo launcher]], and a [[Minelayer (weapon system)|minelayer]]. Along with its deadly armament, the ''Scimitar'' was equipped with a [[cloaking device]], powered by rare [[stygium crystal]]s from the planet [[Aeten II]],''[[TIE Fighter Owners' Workshop Manual]]'' that allowed it to disappear from view and any pursuing ship's sensors. Owing to the craft's experimental [[ion engine]]s, radiator fins on the [[Starship|ship's]] wings were required to be open during flight in order to expel excess heat. The ''Scimitar'' was heavily-modified with numerous added capabilities, including six [[laser cannon]]s, [[spy]] and surveillance gear, [[Interrogation droid|interrogator droids]], and a [[cloaking device]]. The ship carried three [[DRK-1 Dark Eye probe droid]]s and the ''[[Bloodfin]]'', a Sith [[speeder]] utilized by [[Maul|Darth Maul]] during his [[Duel on Tatooine|mission]] on [[Tatooine]]. The ''Scimitar'' was capable of tracking a ship's signature through [[hyperspace]], something considered impossible for other ships. ==History== ===Age of the Republic and the Clone Wars=== {{Quote|It is as you predicted my Lord. We've traced Count Dooku's signal to Dathomir's surface. What is your command?''"
"''Jam their communications and cloak this ship from view. They won't know we've arrived until it's much too late.|General Grievous and Darth Sidious|}} [[File:Sith_Infiltrator_TPM.png|thumb|left|250px|The ''Scimitar'' travels to Tatooine.]] At the [[Galactic Standard Time|time]] of the [[Invasion of Naboo|Invasion]] of [[Naboo]], the ''Scimitar'' was the personal starship of [[Darth]] Maul, who used it in an attempt to track [[Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala]] on Tatooine. After his [[Battle of Naboo|defeat]], the ship fell into the possession of Maul's [[Sith Master|master]], [[Darth Sidious]], while on its way to be studied at [[Kuat Drive Yards]].{{BuildFalconCite|44|Starship Fact File}} During the [[Clone Wars]], the ''Scimitar'' was used to [[transport]] Sidious and [[General]] [[Grievous]] to the surface of [[Dathomir]], where the Sith Master had a [[Second Battle of Dathomir|duel]] with his resurfaced former [[Sith apprentice|apprentice]] and the [[Nightsisters|Nightsister]] [[Mother (title)|Mother]] [[Talzin]]. ===Under the Empire=== {{Quote|I will provide you with ''transportation''—perhaps the only vessel in my great fleet equipped to locate the ''Imperialis''.|Palpatine, to Chanath Cha|[[Lando 2|''Lando'' 2]]}} Many [[Standard year|years]] later, the ''Scimitar'' was still in the possession of Sidious, who now ruled the First [[Galactic Empire]] as [[Galactic Emperor|Emperor]] Palpatine. It was held in [[Imperial Facility 729-D]], located somewhere in the [[Inner Rim Territories|Inner Rim]], and curated by the [[droid]] [[O-66]]. At some point before the [[Battle of Hoth]], the [[bounty hunter]] [[Chanath Cha]] was entrusted with the modified Star Courier in order to retrieve the [[Theft of the Imperialis|stolen]] ''[[Imperialis]]'', Palpatine's luxury [[Yacht|pleasure craft]]. [[File:O-66_XW2.png|thumb|right|250px|O-66 pilots the ''Scimitar'' away as the ''Imperialis'' explodes.]] Chanath and O-66 used the ''Scimitar''{{'s}} advanced tracking systems to find the ''Imperialis''{{'s}} location. While O-66 waited aboard the ''Scimitar'', Chanath boarded the ''Imperialis''. O-66 also transmitted the Imperial yacht's operational codes.[[Lando 4|''Lando'' 4]] After Chanath had set the ship to self-destruct, she ordered O-66 to dock the ''Scimitar'' so that she, [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]], and [[Lobot]] could flee the doomed ''Imperialis''. However, O-66 refused to obey her orders because his primary directive was to protect and honor the ''Scimitar''. Despite Chanath's threats, O-66 revealed he had removed her [[pulse bomb]] and flew the ''Scimitar'' away.[[Lando 5|''Lando'' 5]] ==Behind the scenes== The ''Scimitar'' first appeared in the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. [[De Agostini]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Build the Millennium Falcon]]'' [[Star Wars: Build the Millennium Falcon 44|44]] magazine states that the ''Scimitar'' is equipped with a Class 3.0 [[SSDS 11-A]] hyperdrive, as was originally the case in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity,''[[Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' before later being amended to a Class 1.5 hyperdrive by the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''{{'s}} ''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''.''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' This fact is contradicted by ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles]]'', which indicates that the ship has a Class 2 hyperdrive. This article sides with ''Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles'' as the more recent{{BMFdates|44}} source. ==Appearances== *[[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 1|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 1]] *[[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 2|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 2]] *[[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 3|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 3]] *[[Darth Maul – Black, White & Red 4|''Darth Maul – Black, White & Red'' 4]] *[[Darth Maul (2017) 1|''Darth Maul'' (2017) 1]] *[[Age of Republic -
